zh.Merchiston Tower, Merchiston, City of Ed: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓
zh.Tintinhull, Somerset, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特丁爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Napier於1480年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓時，他的父親Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston31歲，母親Catherine Douglas21歲。他於大約1495年與Anne Russell在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國多瑟特普可諾萊，埋葬在英國多瑟特普可諾萊。

zh-hans.Merchiston Tower, Merchiston, City of Ed: 苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓
zh-hans.Tintinhull, Somerset, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰薩默塞特丁爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Napier于1480年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓时，他的父亲Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston31岁，母亲Catherine Douglas21岁。他于大约1495年与Anne Russell在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国多瑟特普可諾萊，埋葬在英国多瑟特普可諾萊。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When John Napier was born in 1480, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston, was 31 and his mother, Catherine Douglas, was 21. He married Anne Russell about 1495, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Puncknowle, Dorset, England, and was buried in Puncknowle, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Napier est né en 1480, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catherine Douglas, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne Russell environ 1495, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Puncknowle, Dorset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Puncknowle, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Napier 1480 in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston 31 und seine Mutter Catherine Douglas 21. Er hat um 1495 in Scotland Anne Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Puncknowle, Dorset, England und wurde in Puncknowle, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Napier è nato il nel 1480 nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Douglas, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anne Russell circa 1495, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Puncknowle, Dorset, England, e fu sepolto a Puncknowle, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Napierが1480年にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで生まれた時，父Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchistonは31歳，母Catherine Douglasは21歳であった。約1495年にスコットランドでAnne Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスドールセトプウンクノウルで死去し，イギリスドールセトプウンクノウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Napier(이)가 1480년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Douglas(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 스컷랜드에서 Anne Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 도르세트 푸c노우일에서 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 푸c노우일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Napier nasceu em 1480, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Douglas, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Russell aproximadamente 1495, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Napier родился в 1480 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Douglas, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Russell около 1495 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности пунккноул, дорсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности пунккноул, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Napier nació en 1480, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catherine Douglas, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne Russell aproximadamente 1495, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra.
